channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South African coach Manqoba Mngqithi joins Tanzanian league as Young Africans head coach
item.description: Manqoba Mngqithi, the former Golden Arrows coach who guided the KwaZulu-Natal side to a top-eight finish in the Betway Premiership, has been appointed as the new head coach of Tanzanian Premier League...

item.title: NYOTA Fund Discrepancy: Deputy President Kindiki Attributes Shortfall to Technical Error
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki was caught off guard during a NYOTA disbursement event in Nakuru when a beneficiary revealed she received KSh 19,000 instead of the promised KSh 22,000. The discrepanc...

item.title: San Jose Driver Sentenced to Jail for Insurance Fraud and Road Rage Brake-Check Crash
item.description: A San Jose man was sentenced to 60 days in county jail after prosecutors said he intentionally caused a crash with a semi-truck during a road rage incident and then attempted to defraud his insurance ...

item.title: Japan advances reusable rocket technology with successful test flight
item.description: Japan's space agency, JAXA, has successfully conducted its first test flight for an experimental reusable rocket, marking a significant step in reducing space launch costs. The RV-X rocket, developed ...

item.title: Kisii Medical Student Dies Suddenly During Clinical Placement; Classmates Remember Her Compassion
item.description: Mercy Chebet, a student pursuing a Certificate in Healthcare Services Support (Nurse Aide) at Nairobi College of Medical Studies – Kisii Campus, passed away following a short illness. The incident occ...

item.title: Adding Personality to Modern New Build Apartments
item.description: As construction costs rise, soulless white-cube housing is becoming the norm in cities, prompting new-build residents to personalise their spaces. The article explores how individuals are transforming...

item.title: Justin Baldoni defends his ex-co-star amid controversy over Blake Lively's allegations
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing public discourse surrounding Justin Baldoni, an actor and director, who recently broke a two-year silence to publicly criticize Blake Lively following her allegations...

item.title: North Bay Hosts Free FIFA World Cup Fan Fest for Quarterfinals
item.description: North Bay, a city in northern Ontario, is set to become the host of a free FIFA World Cup Fan Fest in July 2026. The event will take place ahead of the quarterfinal matches, offering fans an opportuni...

item.title: Zanzibar Political Leaders Commit to Reconciliation Agreement
item.description: Political leaders in Zanzibar have finalized a reconciliation agreement following a signing ceremony, aiming to bridge longstanding divisions between the ruling Chama Cha Mapinduzi (CCM) party and opp...

item.title: Proton Nears BYD's 2025 EV Sales Record as Tesla Surges to Third in Malaysia's June 2026 Rankings
item.description: The latest data from Malaysia's road transport department (JPJ) reveals Proton's continued dominance in electric vehicle (EV) registrations for June 2026, with 1,888 units registered—a 6.1% increase f...

item.title: West Bengal arrests 35 in Baruipur rape and murder case
item.description: West Bengal police have arrested 35 individuals for violence during protests following the rape and murder of an 11-year-old girl in Baruipur. The incident, which occurred in South 24 Parganas distric...

item.title: Joshua Cheptegei Emphasizes Teamwork for Africa's Fastest 10km Time
item.description: The article discusses Joshua Cheptegei's perspective on the evolution of road racing, comparing it to football and emphasizing the importance of teamwork in achieving sub-27 minute times at the Absa R...

item.title: Army Chief urges South-East leaders and parents to encourage youths to enlist as recruitment quotas remain unfilled
item.description: The Chief of Army Staff, Lt.-Gen. Olufemi Oluyede, has appealed to parents, traditional rulers, religious leaders and other community stakeholders in Nigeria's South-East to encourage qualified young ...

item.title: Tim Merlier claims Tour de France stage victory in Bordeaux sprint
item.description: Belgian cyclist Tim Merlier secured the seventh stage of the 113th Tour de France with a dominant sprint finish in Bordeaux, marking his second stage win of the race. The 175km route from Hagetmau to ...

item.title: Tanzania government supports youth entrepreneurship with 200 billion shilling loan program
item.description: The Tanzanian government has started distributing loans from its 200 billion shilling Youth Development Fund, with Arusha receiving 730 million shillings in the first phase. This initiative aims to ta...

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bot access with detailed instructions
item.description: The text provided appears to be a message from News Corp Australia regarding access restrictions for crawler bots. It explains that automated systems manage bot traffic on their websites and outlines ...

item.title: UK Heatwave Sparks Widespread Hosepipe Ban as Record Temperatures Threaten Water Supplies
item.description: Over 40 million people in the UK are facing stringent water restrictions as a severe heatwave grips the nation, with temperatures exceeding 35°C recorded on six separate days in a single year for the ...

item.title: Prabhsimran Singh shares heartfelt thoughts on India call-up and family health
item.description: In an exclusive interview, Prabhsimran Singh reflects on his recent call-up to the Indian national team, expressing hope that this opportunity might improve his father's health. The athlete emphasizes...

item.title: The Crisis in Higher Education: Professors Grapple with Student Disengagement and AI Cheating
item.description: The article explores the growing crisis in higher education, highlighting a professor's frustration with disengaged students and the broader systemic issues within universities. It discusses how insti...

item.title: ‘Charlie and the Chocolate Factory’ Offers Engaging Family Theater Experience
item.description: The theater production of ‘Charlie and the Chocolate Factory’ has been praised for its family-friendly approach and immersive storytelling. Fred Hawson’s review highlights how the play successfully ad...
